disclaimer: Prices shown here are source-backed snapshots from Ministry of Finance releases. The April 8 citation covers the latest subsidised and regional prices, while the retail-price release below shows the most recent full weekly table we confirmed.

sections.title: Latest full weekly table we confirmed

quotaNotes: General BUDI95 eligibility is temporarily capped at 200 litres per month.
Qualified e-hailing drivers can reach up to 800 litres per month under the tiered eligibility rule.
BUDI Diesel cash assistance remains a targeted support layer instead of a blanket fuel subsidy.
